caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT" printed on it. The setting appears to be a studio or a room dedicated to recording, as evidenced by the professional microphone setup. The background includes framed photographs and a mannequin dressed in casual clothing, suggesting that the location might also serve as a retail space or a personal collection display area. The man seems engaged in conversation, possibly discussing topics related to business, entrepreneurship, or personal experiences, given the context of the podcast's title.
